NewsItem.title: NewsItem
NewsItem.description: A single news item fetched from RSS feeds.

id.description: Unique identifier for the news item.

link.description: URL to the full news story.

pubDate.description: Publication date of the news item.

content.description: Full content or snippet of the news item.

source.description: Source of the news item (e.g., TechCrunch).

summary.description: Short summary of the news item.

imageUrl.description: URL to the news item's image.
